title: Cosmetics Equipment
description: Wear armor for protection and use cosmetic slots for style. Purely visual and easy to use.
body:
**Cosmetics**

**Cosmetics** is a simple cosmetic armor mod that lets you keep your armor stats while changing how your character looks.

You can wear real armor for protection and use cosmetic slots to display different armor (or nothing at all).
Perfect if you want style without sacrificing stats.


🔹 Features

* Separate cosmetic armor slots (Head, Chest, Legs, Feet)
* Keep full armor stats while changing appearance
* Easy-to-use GUI (button in player inventory)
* Toggle cosmetics on/off anytime
* Purely visual — no gameplay advantages


🔹 Notes

* Does **not** add new armor items
* Does **not** affect combat or balance
* Inspired by Cosmetic Armor Reworked

🔹 How to use
  1. Open your inventory
  2. Click **“Open Cosmetics”**
  3. Put armor into cosmetic slots
  4. Enjoy the look 😄
